description: Using the ReqView Example Project, perform a comprehensive architecture-to-test coverage audit. For each component in the ARCH document that has implementation links to SRS requirements, determine which of those SRS requirements are verified by test cases in the TESTS document and which are not. Write a coverage report to /home/ga/Documents/arch_test_coverage.json with this structure: {"components": [{"arch_id": "ARCH-N", "arch_name": "<heading>", "implemented_srs": ["SRS-X", ...], "tested_srs": ["SRS-X", ...], "untested_srs": ["SRS-Y", ...], "coverage_pct": <0-100>}, ...], "summary": {"total_components_audited": N, "fully_covered": N, "partially_covered": N, "zero_coverage": N, "overall_tested": N, "overall_untested": N}}. A component is 'fully_covered' if all its implemented SRS requirements have test verification links, 'zero_coverage' if none do, and 'partially_covered' otherwise.
